Essentials

Sixteen interactive activities across the eight modules of the one-day course. Select a module below to launch an activity full-screen in the room.

Afternoon Modules 6 – 8 · the X Consulting case study

9.10 – 9.30

Introduction to Data Analytics

From intuition-driven decisions to evidence-based thinking — biases, and the difference between correlation and causation.

✓
Simulation

Boardroom Under Pressure

Run the same quarter twice: once on gut feel, once with the data on the table.

Launch
 ✓
Scored Game

The Bias Engine

Nine workplace scenes, nine hidden biases. Then prove causation — if you can.

Launch

9.30 – 9.50

The Data Analytics Pipeline

Define → Get → Clean → Manipulate → Analyse → Communicate — and what it takes to be a data-driven organisation.

✓
Simulation

Pipeline Control Room

Route a real request through the six stations — then see what breaks when you skip one.

Launch
 ✓
Self-Assessment

The Maturity Climb

Twelve honest questions. One radar chart. Your organisation's next rung, personalised.

Launch
3
9.50 – 10.30

Defining Goals & Problems

SMART goals, KPIs versus metrics, clear problem statements and testable hypotheses — where the case study begins.

✓
Wizard

Mission Control: Wish → KPI

Sharpen a vague wish, pick its compass, dodge the vanity metrics, survive the gaming test.

Launch
 ✓
Investigation

The Problem Autopsy

Interview the stakeholders, extract the facts, assemble the real problem behind the vague brief.

Launch
4
10.45 – 11.35

Sourcing Reliable Data

Internal and external, structured and unstructured — where to look, how to get access, and what to trust.

✓
Expedition Game

The Data Hunt

Three questions, twelve sources, a limited effort budget. Assemble the strongest evidence pack.

Launch
 ✓
Case Study

Trust Tribunal

Six sources take the stand. Commit your verdict before the evidence lands — beware the fabricated citation.

Launch
5
11.35 – 12.30

Cleaning & Preparing Data

Real-world messy data, practical fixes, and business judgement over technical perfection — the hands-on heart of the day.

✓
Simulation

The Cleanroom

The real X Consulting file, a professional toolbox, and a live chart that reacts to every fix.

Launch
 ✓
Pressure Game

Good Enough?

The meeting is in four minutes. Eight problems. You can't fix them all — choose what matters.

Launch
6
1.30 – 2.45

Analysing the Data

Descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, prescriptive — climbing from "what happened" to "what should we do".

✓
Climbing Game

The Analytics Ladder

One problem, four rungs — and an overreach trap waiting at the top.

Launch
 ✓
Explorer

Insight Hunter

A live pivot explorer over the real data. Four insights are hidden in it — find and log them.

Launch

3.00 – 4.05

Visualising & Communicating

Chart selection, honest design and the data narrative arc — turning correct analysis into decisions.

✓
Triage Simulation

Chart Surgery

Four sick charts wheeled in. Diagnose, operate, and watch misleading become persuasive.

Launch
 ✓
Branching Story

Pitch to the CEO

4.05 – 5.00

Turning Insights into Action

Scored Simulation

The War Room
